india_trends.summary: Australian shares ended at ​a four-week low on Thursday, extending losses to an eighth straight session as surging oil prices stoked inflation and growth worries, while top grocer Woolworths sank over 7% after warning rising costs ‌would hit ⁠earnings.

india_trends.title: Rising temperatures spark comeback for India's consumer durables sector: Report
india_trends.summary: India's consumer goods sector is seeing a strong rebound. Rising temperatures are boosting sales, especially in southern regions. india_trends.title: Bajaj Finance crosses ₹5 trillion AUM – Cleaner growth ahead?
india_trends.summary: Bajaj Finance continues to impress with over 20% growth in assets under management, crossing the ₹5-trillion mark. With a 22% rise in net profit and easing credit costs, investors are optimistic about the future.

india_trends.title: Bajaj Finserv Q4 Results: Cons PAT rises 5% YoY to Rs 2,539 crore, revenue rises 6%
india_trends.summary: Bajaj Finserv Q4 Results: The company's revenue from operations in Q4FY26 stood at Rs 38,494 crore, up 6% from Rs 36,433 crore in the corresponding quarter of the previous financial year.

india_trends.title: Defence, energy, data centres to lead India’s $800 billion capex wave: Morgan Stanley
india_trends.summary: Morgan Stanley has raised its investment rate forecast to 37.5% of GDP by FY2030, up from 36.5% earlier. This translates into incremental cumulative investments of about $800 billion over the next five years, with nearly 60% expected to flow into energy transition, data centres, and defence.

india_trends.title: At 94, Dinshaw’s Dairy bets on a Gen Z glow-up
india_trends.summary: The legacy dairy major is ditching its zero-marketing past for a total brand overhaul, targeting younger consumers and a national footprint to stay relevant in an increasingly crowded market.

india_trends.title: Markets overlooking macro stress, says Kunal Vora amid oil and currency shock
india_trends.summary: Despite a calm surface, Indian equity markets face mounting macroeconomic pressures from rising crude oil prices and a weakening rupee. india_trends.title: Adani Ports Q4 Results: Net profit grows 10% YoY to Rs 3,329 crore; revenue jumps 26%
india_trends.summary: Adani Ports Q4 Results: The company reported a 10% increase in consolidated net profit to Rs 3,329 crore for the March-ended quarter, with revenue growing 26% year-on-year to Rs 10,737 crore. india_trends.title: IDBI Bank Q4 Results: Net profit falls 5.3% to ₹1,943 crore; NII rises 17% YoY
india_trends.summary: IDBI Bank Q4 Results: Net interest income (NII) in Q4FY26 increased 17% to ₹3,851.5 crore from ₹3,290 crore, year-on-year (YoY).

india_trends.title: Skoda Auto Volkswagen India opens 33,000 sq. ft. R&D wing in Pune
india_trends.summary: Skoda Auto Volkswagen India inaugurated a new 33,000 sq. ft. wing at its Technology Centre Pune, aiming to become a global R&D hub. This expansion enhances localization, supports export markets, and strengthens the group's role in automotive innovation.

india_trends.title: Powergrid board approves proposal to raise Rs 4,000 cr from SBI
india_trends.summary: Power Grid Corporation of India has secured a significant financial boost. Its board approved raising up to Rs 4,000 crore. india_trends.summary: Indian smartphone buyers now focus on personal style and AI capabilities. india_trends.title: Omaxe to invest Rs 250 cr on new housing project in Lucknow
india_trends.summary: Realty firm Omaxe Group will invest Rs 250 crore to develop a housing project in Lucknow, as part of its expansion plan.

india_trends.title: Vedanta demerger done. Should investors buy or sell the stock now?
